dungeon: GENUINE ROTF FACECAM stream (~574s+, 634 f_, 8 dungeon entries; small facecam top-right, so the bottom-left chat IS readable). Boss content is mostly BASE-GAME Oryx the Mad God (the Oryx's-Castle invasion sequence + death line) = corroboration. Plus a flagged HIGH-HP boss lead taunting its own hitpoints (~1.42M HP) and a Galactic-Crate loot feed. Multi-dungeon hop (sandy grid / green realm / space-void / lava).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+f_: an 8-entry multi-dungeon hop — tan SANDY GRID arenas, open GREEN grass realms (with players), dark SPACE/VOID zones (galactic), and RED/LAVA areas. Facecam occupies the top-right; intro/outro on a black panel. No single contiguous dungeon layout (hunt-style); no boss-arena geometry isolated (no bossends, facecam stream).

COME MEET YOUR DOOM AT THE WALLS OF MY CASTLE
You pure mortals! I shall... return...!

I shall return...!'. CANONICAL/no-build, corroboration only. (NB: this is ORYX'S Castle, NOT the priority-recovery Craig's Castle.)
